name: Salmon
description: Natal stream homing intelligence using hierarchical chemical gradient following. Juvenile olfactory imprinting creates a chemical signature memory of the birth stream, recalled years later during adult migration. Magnetic ocean navigation provides open-water orientation, then sequential tributary decision trees guide the final approach. Osmoregulatory transformation enables freshwater-saltwater transition. Die-off completes a nutrient cycle, depositing marine-derived nitrogen into forest ecosystems.

core_attributes.neurology: olfactory imprint memory, magnetic sense, osmoregulatory switching
core_attributes.pattern: natal homing, hierarchical chemical navigation, nutrient cycle completion
